description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image, runs apk update and apk add make tar git zip in a global before_script, and provides a docker:dind service. Set the CI variables CARGO_HOME to .cargo, DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, and GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Add a make-image job (default build stage) that executes make sdimage-ci &> build.log, caches the buildroot/output/ directory with a key based on the job name and branch, always publishes the artifacts sdcard.img.zip, update.zip, and build.log named sdimage-$CI_COMMIT_SHA, and runs on runners tagged disk-image. Add a rust-tests job (default test stage) that caches pISO/target/ and pISO/.cargo/ using a similar cache key, runs make test-ci, and shares the global before_script and service.
